mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tag ORDER BY use_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.name as name, SUM(CASE WHEN n.status != 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as count FROM tag t LEFT JOIN note_tag nt ON t.id = nt.tag_id LEFT JOIN note n ON nt.note_id = n.id GROUP BY t.id, t.name HAVING count > 0 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
